title: Source Documentation and Linting
content_html:
Source Documentation and Linting

Explore useful source-documentation and lint conventions that improve code re-entry and automated feedback without demanding comments on obvious code.

Feature Documents

  • Concept — proposed JSDoc, docstring, Ruff, and ESLint direction and adoption questions.
  • Repository Roadmap — relative importance and sequence.

Background Research

These documents help explore the available techniques. They are assumption-prone background, not current repository policy or implementation instructions:

  • Improving Repository Context for Coding Agents — exact and semantic retrieval, source context, types, tests, and linting.
  • Introducing JavaScript Configuration to the Repository — possible JavaScript project configuration and staged type-checking direction.
  • Recommended JSDoc Approach for the Repository — selective JSDoc content, scope, and review guidance.

A bounded Docs Viewer pilot delivery is proposed; no implementation is active. Stable repository guidance should change only after representative code proves the conventions and tool choices.
